User.title: User
User.description: Represents an Agent, Staff, or Admin in the field collection system.

mobile.description: Unique mobile phone number of the user, acts as document ID

password.description: Hashed or plain password string for security verification

role.description: System access level of the user

status.description: Accounts can be quickly disabled to block login access

registered_device_id.description: Identifier of the browser session or mobile device

is_first_time.description: True if user must change password during initial login

creator_mobile.description: Mobile ID of the Admin who registered this staff/agent

Vehicle.title: Vehicle
Vehicle.description: Vehicle asset details used for tracing, search, and repossession status.

registration_number.description: Target registration plate number used for search queries

model.description: Compact or heavy vehicle model name

status.description: Defaults to Active repossession instruction state

bank_name.description: Credit bank or financial provider holding the asset interest

pos.description: Point of sale bank branch location descriptor

engine_number.description: Last digits of the motor block used as filter search

chassis_number.description: Vehicle chassis alignment ID used as filter search

confirmer_name.description: Bank manager or supervisor approving repossession

UploadedFile.title: UploadedFile
UploadedFile.description: Import catalogue tracking spreadsheet operations by supervisors.

admin_mobile.description: Admin identity launching the batch write

record_count.description: Count of successful vehicle sheets lines appended

SearchHistory.title: SearchHistory
SearchHistory.description: Audit trail logging search runs by active field agents.

FieldPermissions.title: FieldPermissions
FieldPermissions.description: Boolean switches masking specific vehicle fields dynamically for agent groups.

users/{mobile}.description: User profiles indexed by mobile number key

vehicles/{vehicleId}.description: Automotive ledger profiles under repossession lists

search_histories/{historyId}.description: Interactive search auditing logs for regulatory enforcement

field_permissions/{permId}.description: Agent configuration masks controlling detail UI listings
